title: Better View
description: Better View makes combat and exploration clearer by reducing the size of the fire, shield, and totem—keeping Minecraft’s vanilla style while improving visibility.
body:
![Titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d8a45528fd8f737af58a2e24c8d5683b40c7a52.png)

---

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e5d47afb1ec97eaf67b51e3922abe80f00bf06.png)](https://discord.gg/r5u6jwpHJY) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85767d619d6e19ce7285fa1798c07c196575a0ea_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/victorwinner/projects)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c39355dab93d38f00808074166bd07c6a1dad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/VictorWinner)

---

See more, play better.

Better View is a lightweight texture pack designed to improve visibility during gameplay. It reduces the size and obstruction of common screen-blocking elements without removing them completely.

---

**📷 Media**

![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PGZ4kn35/images/be746af459ad42c2ac1e745adf5ec76da6be6d0f.png)
Before


![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PGZ4kn35/images/acd9b2f5bced85f46a9e3d00c71b021fd9fb5b49.png)
After

---

<details>
<summary>🧱 What's Included?</summary>

**🔥 Reduced fire texture**

**🛡️ Compact shield**

**🪔 Smaller totem of undying** 

</details>

<details>
<summary>🎯 Who is this for?</summary>

- Survival players who want more visibility during combat and adventures.

- PvP players who don’t want shields or totems blocking their view.

- Explorers who prefer clear sight even in tricky situations (like when on fire).

- Vanilla fans who like the original style but appreciate subtle improvements.

</details>



<details>
<summary>💡 Note</summary>

If something doesn’t work or you have any questions, feel free to reach out on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/r5u6jwpHJY).

</details>
